title: Rainbow Bricks
description: A Mod that just give you the choice to dye your Stone Bricks and add a little color to your World!
body:
A Mod that just give you the choice to dye your Stone Bricks and add a little **color** to your World!

[![Invite to Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba2323f25b7192e1a33479b703934f9532769a0.png)](https://discord.com/invite/e5C2MUBndf)

![All the Rainbow Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/075864797963d3f9306bafba6a6978d5f618d641.png)


![Example Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/322f82aa56d7dab8fa01dcd67790cdc2f495215e.png)
